message: perf(capture): default to classic engine and add flag

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,11 @@ extension SeeCommand: CommanderSignatureProviding {
                     help: "Output path for screenshot",
                     long: "path"
                 ),
+                .commandOption(
+                    "captureEngine",
+                    help: "Capture engine: auto|classic|cg|modern|sckit (defaults to auto)",
+                    long: "capture-engine"
+                ),
                 .commandOption(
                     "screenIndex",
                     help: "Specific screen index to capture (0-based)",
